summary: Iteration 61 - Wealth Command v6.0.0 Unified Execution Layer Complete Testing. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Advisor Command Center loads correctly with all v6.0.0 features. Unified Execution Layer fully operational in DEMO MODE.
critical_code_review_comments: All v6.0.0 Unified Execution Layer endpoints working correctly
Health check returns v6.0.0 with execution_layer object containing all 6 components
Execution Layer: Order submission, positions, block trading all working in demo mode
Portfolio Engine: 5 model portfolios (Conservative Income, Balanced Growth, Growth Focused, Aggressive Tech, Crypto Allocation)
Smart Router: Order routing with 5 venues (Alpaca, IBKR, Binance, Coinbase, ASX), compliance checks working
Crypto Integration: 8 assets (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, USDC, USDT), custody providers, portfolio summary
Real-Time Data: 16+ symbols tracked, market indices, market summary with mood indicator
Reconciliation: Cross-platform reconciliation across 7 data sources, unified client views

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard loads correctly with all v6.0.0 features)

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data for testing. Created TEST_ prefixed orders for execution layer testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 completed v6.0.0 Unified Execution Layer testing. All 6 execution layer components verified: (1) Execution Layer - trading/orders/positions, (2) Portfolio Engine - 5 model portfolios/rebalancing, (3) Smart Router - 5 venues/compliance, (4) Crypto - 8 assets/custody, (5) Real-Time - 16+ symbols/WebSocket ready, (6) Reconciliation - 7 data sources. All trading is in DEMO MODE - Alpaca/Crypto exchanges not connected (no API keys). Compliance modal requires checkbox before accepting.
